build.buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @town/contract build && pnpm --filter world build

deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ -n "$VAULT_DEPLOY_KEY_B64" ]; then echo "$VAULT_DEPLOY_KEY_B64" | base64 -d > /tmp/vault-key && chmod 600 /tmp/vault-key; fi && node apps/world/dist/db/migrate.js && node apps/world/dist/db/seed.js && node apps/world/dist/index.js'
